case_title: HUNTER BLOCK ET AL VS. LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLOCK, HUNTER BLOCK, TENNYSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP $1,867.20 PRINCIPAL, $172.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,039.70, PLAINTIFFS ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT SHOULD NOT HAVE APPLIED FOR DAMAGES OR FOR LATE FEES, WHICH THAY HAD NOT RECEIVED TIMELY NOTICE OF. PLAINTIFFS' RENT REDUCTION DAMAGES CLAIM FOR THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL EX PARTE MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE AND DECLERATION RE: NOTICE OF EX-PARTE APPLICATION FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING DATE FILED BY APPELLANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,544.46 FILED BY BLOCK, HUNTER BLOCK, TENNYSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2016 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEP-15-2016 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-02-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY BLOCK, HUNTER BLOCK, TENNYSON LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BLOCK, HUNTER LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETAINED BY APPEALS AND RETURNED BACK TO SMALL CLAIMS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS HUNTER BLOCK & TENNYSON BLOCK, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE SOPHIE LAU, LANDLORD OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM BOTH PLAINTIFFS & DEFENDANTS. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (EXHIBITS TRANSFERED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DEPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BLOCK, HUNTER LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP $1,867.20 PRINCIPAL, $172.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,039.70 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
